name: organic-todo
description: Grove — tasks, focus & memo for desktop and mobile (PWA)

scripts.pwa:preview: npm run build:pwa && npx --yes serve app -p 4173
scripts.icons: python scripts/prepare-icon.py && tauri icon public/Grove_icon_square.png && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p='public/Grove_icon.png';fs.copyFileSync(p,'src/Grove_icon.png');fs.copyFileSync('public/Grove_icon_square.png','assets/tray-icon.png');"

author: Ethan Kunder
